Released: 15 April 2026

Advanced Storage Pack 1.6.0 introduces a critical stability fix.

## Bug Fixes

<table class="table w-100"><thead><tr><th>Description</th><th width="10%">Addresses</th></tr></thead><tbody>
<tr><td><details><summary>Bluefin - Fixed tuple decompression bug introduced in 1.5.0</summary><hr/><p>Fixed a bug in tuple decompression that was introduced in version 1.5.0.</p>
</details></td><td></td></tr>
<tr><td><details><summary>Bluefin - Fixed a potential segmentation fault error in logical decoding of multi-insert.</summary><hr/><p>Resolved a potential segmentation fault that could occur when performing logical decoding of multi-insert operations in Bluefin.</p>
</details></td><td></td></tr>
</tbody></table>
